project_type: Python deep learning model (EEG foundation model)
test_framework: No formal test framework - uses __main__ blocks for validation
verification_instructions: Run python3 models/mbg.py which has a __main__ block that creates the model and runs a forward pass with mock data. Verify output shape is (B, C, T, D).
setup_instructions: pip3 install torch (CPU) numpy scipy einops. mamba-ssm requires CUDA so we use a fallback implementation.
environment_constraints: Python 3.9, PyTorch 2.8.0+cpu available, mamba-ssm NOT available (requires CUDA/triton), must implement Mamba fallback for CPU testing. No torch_geometric - implement GAT from scratch.
contribution_requirements: Follow same interface conventions as CBraMod/EEGMamba (same __init__ signature, same forward I/O shape). Do NOT use PyTorch Geometric.
key_patterns: Both CBraMod and EEGMamba use: (1) same __init__ signature: in_dim=200, out_dim=200, d_model=200, dim_feedforward=800, seq_len=30, n_layer=12, nhead=8; (2) PatchEmbedding with temporal Conv2d + spectral FFT + positional Conv2d encoding; (3) Input (B,C,T,P) -> Output (B,C,T,out_dim); (4) model_for_tuab.py pattern: load backbone, replace proj_out with Identity, add classifier head; (5) _weights_init function for initialization; (6) einops for reshaping
directory_structure: Target: /projects/sandbox/mbg/ with models/, modules/, utils/ subdirectories. Reference repos at /projects/sandbox/CBraMod/ and /projects/sandbox/EEGMamba/
